raw_text: contact me at 9 in ú address: international students apartment, t27, northwestern polytechnical university, no.127, youyi west road, beilin district, xi'an 710072, shaanxi province, china. rbouderrah@gmail.com @bouderrah ramzi +86 18909209592 language skills arabic french english chinese practical skills matlab/simulink cad softwares px4 development python programming practical problem solving teamwork leadership accountability microsoft office package bouderrah ramzi aerospace engineering personal profile 22-year-old moroccan currently living in china. will graduate from northwestern polytechnical university in july 2023 with a bachelor's degree in aeronautical engineering. practical experience maintenance of light-sport aircrafts internship royal aeroclub of marrakesh-morocco oct 2021-jan 2022 e assiting in maintenance procedures in light aircrafts. e assisting in the aeroclub's ground operations programming control system of evtol aircraft xi'an and taicang-chinafeb 2023-june 2023 e dynamic modelling of a hybrid type evtol vehicle. e designing the controller of said vehicle. e simulation and certification. e integration of controls into the vehicle's hardware. educational history northwestern polytechnical university xi'an-china september 2019 - july 2023 e bachelor in aeronautical engineering e thesis project: design and manufacturing of an evtol vehicle, in the control and avionics division. elaraki highschool: marrakesh-morocco 2018-2019 e highschool degree in experimental sciences. interests: basketball: member and president of basketball operations for npu international college.
